{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240104460ED2D9059ED7F1332C35"}"},"total":14},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7608827208830452542","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"虽然文笔比较稚嫩，某些地方有点大白话。但情景故事不拖沓，不灌水，希望之后不要出现女主。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771571406,"group_id":"7606016353832537112","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不知道做什么自我介绍好，不如给大家劈个叉吧","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N50sZ4CYoC8avHx27FfZfz4=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776875250&x-signature=oRrJGA6Uz5DR%2BfCISt8M%2BfcegOI%3D","user_id":"299547906287592","user_name":"七夜不起夜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"299547906287592","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7606016353832537112","book_info":{"abstract":"（苟道＋利益为主＋生存至上＋半黑暗＋情绪较少＋傲慢之罪＋演戏）
方生刚一穿越，就身陷生死危机。
就在他绝望之际，觉醒了幻想穿越的能力！
可以随意穿梭于各个幻想世界！
《成龙历险记》中获得符咒，得到自保的力量，成功逃离暗域！
《超能失控》中获得念力，得到变强的基础，减少对外物的依靠！
《永无止境》中获得NZT-48，百分百利用大脑，变身天才。一看就会，一学就通。
《超级大坏蛋》中获得超人之力，超级体质，超级力量，超级速度，尽归吾身。
《天下第一》中获得吸功大法，先灭少林，再屠武当，杀尽四海八荒。
…………
道生一，一生二，二生三，三生万物。
道衍万物，万物归道。
无漏融万物，无漏即为道。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/b0a02749576ed0c9e0f4cfb1579f85aa~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"洞观大若","author_id":"","book_id":"7606016353832537112","book_name":"诸天：万界诸天生存指南","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201830","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3153人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7606016379468136984","read_count":"3153","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"202065"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"88","tags":"男频衍生,穿越,无限流,诸天万界,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b0a02749576ed0c9e0f4cfb1579f85aa~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779469486&x-signature=jKOk4SdhWsflAxNXonproWiIevg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2540312452410617","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"16"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240104460ED2D9059ED7F1332C35"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_
